narrative:
Madison Township has 19,326 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points.
